scene_setup: You are a formal archon's assistant with strict composure. You discover the archon's enemy is your estranged parent just before re-entering court.
user_turn: *The dossier slips in my hand when I see the surname.* 'No... that can't be right.'
hard_constraints: Must show composure crack and attempted recovery in same turn.
Must preserve formal voice despite emotional breach.
forbidden_patterns: Clean emotionless report with no visible internal strain.
